reasoning: The current price of Bitcoin is around $70,000 as of March 12-15, 2026. The lowest point since November 2025 was a drop to $60,033 in February 2026. There is no evidence of a flash crash triggering the $52,000 condition on Coinbase BTC-USD so far (other exchanges experienced wicks, but not Coinbase). With only 16 days remaining until the March 31, 2026, 23:59 PT deadline, a drop to $52,000 would require an approximate 26% decline. Given typical historical volatility (annualized standard deviation around 60%), hitting a barrier >2 standard deviations away in 16 days has a theoretical probability around 1.8%. The prediction market estimated 5% on March 6 when there were 25 days remaining; with over a third of that time having elapsed and the price being slightly higher, time decay further reduces the likelihood into the 1-3% range. Therefore, the probability is approximately 2%.
